generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swinging motion"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance CraneTimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data stored in TimescaleDB with sensor readings and control commands"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted, WindSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance DockerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization using Docker for the digital twin system"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, DataVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService, SimulationService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for storing sensor readings and control commands"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance GrafanaEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data visualization tool for dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance MosquittoBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for real-time data transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService, DataVisualizationService
]

instance GantrylibPythonEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python module gantrylib for crane control and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService, SimulationService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance ArduinoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Hardware control via Arduino for physical components"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance Fusion360Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "CAD modeling using Autodesk Fusion360"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance CapellaEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MBSE modeling using Capella"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model of gantry crane created in Autodesk Fusion360"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Fusion360Enabler
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model for trajectory optimization"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantrylibPythonEnabler
]

instance SimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model for crane dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantrylibPythonEnabler
]

instance ArcadiaModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Arcadia model for system architecture using Capella"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CapellaEnabler
]

instance TrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory generation based on kinematic model"
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryOptimizationInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Logging of historical crane state data to TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data visualization using Grafana dashboard for trajectory traces and validation results"
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryTraceInsight, ValidationResultInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation comparing real trajectories with simulations via distance metrics"
    DTDFVocab:provides MaintenanceAlertInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation of crane and controller dynamics for virtual commissioning"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationDataInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection using time series classification techniques"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight
]

instance TrajectoryOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized trajectory path for crane movement"
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical data logs for analysis and replay"
]

instance TrajectoryTraceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of trajectory traces for monitoring crane movement"
]

instance ValidationResultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Comparison of real trajectories with simulations via distance metrics"
]

instance MaintenanceAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alerts operators when discrepancies exceed thresholds for maintenance decisions"
]

instance SimulationDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulated crane dynamics data for comparison with real-world"
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected faults in crane system using time series classification"
]

instance CartMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval controller for cart movement"
]

instance HoistMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval controller for hoist movement"
]

instance CartStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor for cart movement"
]

instance HoistStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor for hoist movement"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet at end of hoist for container pickup"
]

instance DigitalTwinSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Centralized digital twin system with six interconnected containers"
    base:contains TimescaleDBEnabler, GrafanaEnabler, TrajectoryGenerationService, SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, MosquittoBrokerEnabler
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands generated by Trajectory Generator Service and Control Application sent via Physical Crane Interface to motors and electromagnet for movement execution."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real-time synchronization; data logging and validation occur without fixed intervals, with services operating in near real-time during crane operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated via MQTT Broker connecting physical containers (Physical Crane, Physical Crane Interface, Control Application, Logging Application, HMI) and digital containers (Database, Dashboard, Trajectory Generator, Simulation, Validation), with data flow through TimescaleDB and real-time signaling."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers 'as operated' phase of the physical crane during operational use, with continuous validation and fault detection applied to real-time operational data."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous Validation Service compares real trajectory measurements with simulations, calculates distance metrics against predefined thresholds; threshold breaches trigger operator notifications for validation checks."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol (Eclipse Mosquitto) for inter-service communication; data transmission between physical and digital components via MQTT topics and TimescaleDB."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Docker containers for Database, MQTT Broker, and Dashboard; gantrylib Python module installed via pip on a personal computer; docker-compose for unified deployment."
]
